questionHtml: Explain whether these results fit the predicted Mendelian ratios for this cross.
markschemeHtml:
1.  independent assortment predicts 1:1:1:1
     OR
     this (mendelian) ratio not seen / recombinants less frequent/parental types more frequent;
  2.  suggests linkage
     OR
     small numbers so could be a result of differential survival;

meta.title: Explain whether these results fit the predicted Mendelian ratios for this cross.
breadcrumbLabels: D3.2.17. Punnett grids for predicting genotypic and phenotypic ratios in dihybrid crosses involving pairs of unlinked autosomal genes
